name: Armorer
description: Can craft, repair and modify weapons and armor in safe areas or at camp with a Forge Hammer and required materials. Can temporarily sharpen weapons at camp with proper tools.

name: Tailor
description: Can craft, repair and modify clothing items with Arthosium Thread Weaving in safe areas or at camp with a Tailor's Kit and required materials.

name: Lockpick
description: Can use a lock picking tool to attempt to crack locked doors, containers, etc.

name: Trapper
description: Can set up traps and use a Trap Probe to disarm pre-set traps for your own use.

name: Counterfeiter
description: Can replicate small items like documents, keys, coins, etc. An observant NPC may recognize your item as a fake.

name: Diviner
description: Can magically infer the usage/purpose of magic items without an Arcana check. Grants permanent advantage on other Arcana checks.

name: Chef
description: Can use ingredient items to make meals at camp.

name: Analyst
description: Can learn an enemy unit's weak point (1D20+INT / 13+ grants this knowledge). Can only be done once per unit type per battle.

name: Alchemist
description: Can combine chemistry ingredients at camp using an Alchemist Kit to craft potions, oils, etc. Also allows transmutation of some materials during rest. Roll: 1D20+MEM / 1-5 fail / 6-15 success / 16-19 +1 / 20 +2.

name: Medic
description: Can determine the nature of injuries, cause of death, identify diseases, and parse the approximate HP remaining of enemies in combat (DM tells player if target is above or below ½ HP) Can use 1 Stamina to heal 1D6 HP to self / an ally within melee range, reduce the healing time of a fracture when using a brace by 1D4 intervals, cure hemorrhages with a tailor’s kit, redo a coin flip once made when using unclean items to heal hemorrhages, and can make all the party’s unclean bandages clean as a camp action

name: Pilferer
description: Can steal small objects from NPCs (FNS vs Target's SRV contest). Being hidden/invisible grants advantage. Some enemy rare items can only be obtained by pilfering.

name: Performer
description: Can play musical instruments, sing, or act to impress, entertain or distract others (requires CHA check).

name: Acrobat
description: Can perform feats of agility without a required roll. Base Jump distance increased to 4+STR / Elevation +2.

name: Enchanter
description: Can permanently add enchantments to weapons. Advanced enchantments can only be done by the Enchanter class.

name: Botanist
description: Gain advantage on Nature checks towards plantlife/fungus. Increase Ingredient Level of all chemistry items by 1 star in your inventory.

name: Tunneler
description: Can identify mine spots without a check. Can find places to tunnel to unlock secret paths or treasures.

name: Guerilla
description: Can not be targeted by attacks of opportunity. DMG dealt during ambush attacks deal the weapon's maximum possible value.

name: Brawler
description: Gain advantage on Martial Maneuvers when unarmed. Fist weapons and unarmed DMG increased by 1 DT.

name: Engineer
description: Can craft, repair and modify Autobows, Mortars and Energy Weapons in safe areas or at camp with a Forge Hammer and required materials. Required for installing weapons/furnishings on a ship.
